---
title: "Lady Eleanor Wodehouse"
---

## Lady Eleanor Wodehouse

**Dates:** (d. 1895)

**Maiden name:** (Ashburnham)

### Description

wife of the Rev. Algernon Wodehouse

### Biography

She married (1844) the Rev. Algernon Wodehouse, Rector of Easton, near Winchester;  she was aunt of the poet Swinburne and of Mrs Disney Leith.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 1st 1863
- Letter from June 9, 1854

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
